name: Tainan Enterprise (Cayman) Co., Limited
summary: Tainan Enterprise (Cayman) Co., Limited designs, develops, produces, and sells clothing products in China. It offers urban fashion and casual men's and women's wear, sportswear, dresses, and accessories. The company markets and sells its products under the TONY JEANS, TONY UOMO, TJL, VOV, G-cut, Emely, and Emely Sweetie brand names. It also operates as sales representative of FILA brand apparel and accessories. The company was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Grand Cayman, the Cayman Islands.
